overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a Jedi character exploring a misty alien marshland on Kashyyyk. The character transitions from wading through shallow water with lily pads to walking along ancient elevated stone pathways with railings, eventually entering a dark cave tunnel. The atmosphere is atmospheric and overcast with blue-gray tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty marshland with shallow water and rocky cliffs

events.description: character turns left away from waterfall and begins walking toward shore
moving from deep water onto shallow shore with stone ruins visible

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow water observing the misty waterfall, then turning and wading through aquatic vegetation toward the shore

notable_agents.action: small droid (BD-1) floating closely behind the main character

tall moss-covered stone cliffs forming the canyon walls
tall moss-covered stone cliffs forming the canyon walls

tall cattails and reeds growing in the shallow water

weathered stone structures partially covered in vegetation on the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing in shallow misty water facing a waterfall between rocky cliffs. The character turns left and walks through dense aquatic vegetation including reeds and lily pads, heading toward ancient stone ruins visible on the shore. A small droid follows closely behind as the camera tracks the movement through the marsh.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone walkway with lit torches and retaining walls

events.description: exits shallow water onto constructed stone pathway with walls and torches
warm torchlight becomes visible against the cool natural light

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone steps onto the elevated pathway and proceeding along the torch-lit walkway

entered.detail: weathered stone tiles forming an elevated walkway
moss-covered stone walls lining both sides of the path
moss-covered stone walls lining both sides of the path
burning torches mounted on stone pillars providing warm light
burning torches mounted on stone pillars providing warm light
ornate dark metal railings along the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the natural marsh onto an ancient constructed stone pathway elevated above the water. The walkway is lined with moss-covered retaining walls and burning torches that cast warm light. Metal railings appear on the right side as the character proceeds forward along the weathered stone tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cliffside walkway with ocean view

events.description: pathway opens to reveal expansive ocean view on the right side
character briefly stops to look over the railing then continues walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated cliffside path with the ocean visible to the right, pausing briefly to look over the railing

entered.detail: expansive body of water visible beyond the cliff edge
rocky islands and cliff formations across the water
dark tunnel entrance carved into the cliff face ahead

segments.scene_description: The stone pathway continues along the cliffside, now open to the air with metal railings on the right overlooking the ocean. Distant rock formations are visible across the water. The path leads toward a dark cave entrance in the cliff face ahead, with the character walking steadily along the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cave tunnel with light at distant exit

events.description: entering the dark cave tunnel from the open cliffside walkway
location text 'KASHYYYK FOOTHILLS' appears indicating the region

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark cave tunnel toward the bright light visible at the far end

entered.detail: dark rocky tunnel with uneven walls and ceiling
rough stone walls of the cave interior
rough stone walls of the cave interior
bright daylight streaming from the tunnel exit ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark cave tunnel carved through the rock, leaving the ocean view behind. The environment becomes dimly lit with rough stone walls surrounding the path. Bright light streams in from the tunnel exit ahead as the character walks deeper into the cave system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty aquatic marshland toward the dark interior of a cliffside cave. It begins with the character facing a waterfall between rocky cliffs before turning to wade through dense reeds and lily pads toward ancient stone ruins, accompanied by a small droid. As the character leaves the water, the scene shifts onto an elevated stone pathway lined with mossy walls and burning torches that cast a warm glow against the blue-gray atmosphere. The walkway then opens up along the cliffside, revealing metal railings and a wide view of the ocean and distant rock formations, before turning toward a dark cave entrance. Finally, the camera follows the character into the dimly lit tunnel, leaving the open air behind as they move through rough stone walls toward a bright light at the exit.
